ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report type */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module related to the report */,
  "closed" INTEGER /* Status of the report (0 - open, 1 - closed) */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text description of the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was submitted */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was added to the system */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the report */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the report (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the report (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Text describing how the issue was resolved */,
  "resolved_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was resolved */,
  "reopened_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been reopened */,
  "last_updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  "attachments" TEXT /* JSON array to store any attachments related to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_type_id") REFERENCES report_types ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon representing the report type */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Active status of the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon representing the module */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Active status of the module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Active status of the user account */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned the report */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being assigned the report */,
  "assigned_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was assigned */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the report */,
  "resolved_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was resolved */,
  "closed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who closed the report */,
  "closed_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was closed */,
  "last_updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_assignments_closed_by FOREIGN KEY ("closed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_assignments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_assignments_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_assignments_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Active status of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "commented_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "resolved_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was resolved (if applicable) */,
  "last_updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_comments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update being made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the update */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the update */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the update was made */,
  "last_updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_history_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
